Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Hmm this is a process mining task where I need to analyze an event log for a customer support ticket system The user wants me to identify cases with long resolution times find root causes and suggest improvements

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First I should calculate the total resolution time for each case by finding the time difference between the first and last events Looking at the data Case 102 104 and 105 seem to span multiple days while others are resolved within hours

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The pattern is clear escalations to Level2 agents and long idle times before investigation are the main bottlenecks For example Case 105 has a 29hour gap between escalation and the next investigation Also tickets assigned to Level1 agents sometimes sit idle for hours before investigation starts

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I can propose specific recommendations like parallel workflows for escalations realtime dashboards to monitor idle tickets and dedicated Level2 queues to reduce handoff delays The key is to balance workload and minimize waiting times between steps
